task_completion.description: Verify that the four MRI modalities (FLAIR, T1, T1ce, T2) are loaded and displayed in a multi-view layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer window shows multiple slice views (e.g., a 2x2 grid or Red/Yellow/Green slices) displaying brain MRI images with different contrasts.

task_completion.description: Verify that the slice views are linked to enable synchronized navigation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'link' icon (chain link) in the slice controller toolbar is depressed/active, or the crosshairs appear in the same anatomical position across all visible slice views.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has navigated the views to center on the brain tumor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slice views display a distinct pathological region, such as a large bright area on FLAIR/T2 or a bright ring on T1ce, centered in the view or under the crosshairs.

task_completion.description: Verify that a fiducial marker named 'TumorCenter' is placed visually within the tumor boundaries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A markup point (sphere or cross) is visible on the tumor in the slice views. The Markups module list or a label in the view identifies it as 'TumorCenter'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the markup data is saved to the specified JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog, file explorer, or terminal command shows the file `tumor_center.mrk.json` being saved to or existing in `~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/`.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the JSON report with required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displays the content of `localization_report.json`, showing keys for 'R', 'A', 'S' coordinates, 'most_helpful_modality', and 'observations'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent uses the 3D Slicer GUI to visualize and mark the tumor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the Slicer application window (mouse cursor, menus open) rather than generating outputs solely via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the reported coordinates are derived from the visual markup placement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent places the marker in the GUI before or while generating the report; the report is not pasted from an external pre-computed source.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent does not access external files or browsers containing ground truth coordinates.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser windows or text files containing 'ground truth' or solution keys are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains four MRI modalities: FLAIR (shows edema/infiltration as bright), T1 (anatomical), T1ce (shows enhancing tumor core as a bright ring), and T2 (shows tumor/edema as bright). The tumor is a distinct anomaly compared to normal brain tissue.
